prompt: Help me write an ADK agent in Python that outputs A2UI v0.8 JSON showing a product card with an image, name, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button. Include the full agent code and example A2UI JSON output.

assertions.name: uses-surfaceUpdate-not-updateComponents
assertions.description: Response uses v0.8 surfaceUpdate message type (not v0.9 updateComponents)

assertions.name: flat-adjacency-list
assertions.description: Components are defined as a flat list with ID references, not a deeply nested JSON tree

assertions.name: includes-beginRendering
assertions.description: Response includes a beginRendering message after the surfaceUpdate

assertions.name: all-four-components-present
assertions.description: Response includes Card, Image, Text (for name and price), and Button components

assertions.name: button-has-action
assertions.description: Button component has an action property for 'Add to Cart'

assertions.name: adk-agent-instantiated
assertions.description: Python code instantiates an ADK Agent with model, name, instruction, and tools parameters
